title: Forgotten Church
description: Adds a creepy abandoned church with zombies and hidden loot
body:
This mod adds a Forgotten Church to Minecraft, a spooky, abandoned building filled with hidden loot, and zombies.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d296f8b53785066f7f02b2bd34bb260387c9bcb.jpeg)

The zombies wander inside, guarding the hidden loot.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832eee248306ed007b59ca34a27057fb71fb4906.jpeg)


The church naturally spawns in Plains, Forest, and Taiga biomes. 

Feel free to put it in your modpack!
